name: Adult Social Care - Case Note
description: Generates a structured case note from a social care interaction, including key concerns, actions agreed, and safeguarding flags.

name: Housing Assessment Summary
description: Produces a summary of a housing needs assessment conversation, highlighting eligibility, priority need, and next steps.

name: Child & Family Meeting Minutes
description: Creates formal meeting minutes from a child and family support meeting, capturing attendees, decisions, and action items.

name: Mental Health Review Note
description: Summarises a mental health review conversation into a clinical-style note with risk assessment and care plan updates.

name: Safeguarding Referral Draft
description: Drafts a safeguarding referral based on conversation content, extracting key risk indicators and recommended actions.

name: Brief Telephone Summary
description: Generates a concise summary of a telephone interaction with a service user, capturing the reason for call and outcome.

name: Multi-Agency Meeting Summary
description: Produces a structured summary from a multi-agency meeting, mapping contributions by agency and agreed joint actions.

name: Early Help Assessment Note
description: Creates an early help assessment note from a conversation, identifying family strengths, needs, and recommended support.
